creator: software-freebsd@interfasys.ch
text:
The problem is that that file is for UIDs introduced by ports only and gets overwritten all the time, so how are we supposed to set EXIM_USER in our make.conf so that it's properly taken into consideration by the port?

I do manually add the line I have in /etc/passwd so that I can upgrade Exim, but that's not a very clean solution.

Feel free to redirect me to any documentation you know about. All I could find was doc about how to build ports.
